headline: Huntington Cadence Merger Expands Southern Reach And Raises Value Questions
summary: Huntington Bancshares (NasdaqGS:HBAN) has completed its merger with Cadence Bank. The combined bank now has about 1,400 branches across 21 states, with a larger presence in the Southern US. Huntington becomes the largest bank in Mississippi by deposit market share and adds significant scale in Texas. The company plans to keep and invest in Cadence's branch network instead of pursuing large scale closures. For you as an investor, this merger reshapes Huntington's profile from a primarily...

headline: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated to Present at the 2026 RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) will participate in the 2026 RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference on Wednesday, March 11, 2026. Brant Standridge, president of consumer and regional banking, and Zach Wasserman, chief financial officer, are scheduled to present to analysts and investors at 10:00 AM (Eastern Time). They will discuss business trends, financial performance, and strategic initiatives. The presentation will include forward-looking statements.

headline: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness And Conflicting Fair Value Estimates
summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) has been on investor watchlists after recent share price weakness, with the stock showing negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months, even as the 1 year total return remains positive. See our latest analysis for Huntington Bancshares. headline: Is Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Pricing Reflect Long Term Value After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Huntington Bancshares at around US$16.68 is offering fair value or an opportunity, you are in the right place to assess what the current price actually reflects. The stock has seen mixed returns, with a 4.9% decline over the last week and a 9.3% decline over the last month, but a 14.5% return over 1 year, 39.2% over 3 years and 27.6% over 5 years. These different time frames can influence how investors think about both potential growth and risk. Recent attention...
